$comment: Index of brand assets. Source of truth for 'what imagery/branding exists and where'. Fill TODO(owner) as assets are finalized. Large originals live off-repo (Drive/Canva) and are referenced by 'location'.

palette.$note: Pulled from the Canva site (honeyrootcoffeeco.my.canva.site). Warm cream on a deep oxblood base, with slate-blue and sage as supporting tones. Keep to ~4 in use.

fonts.$note: Match the Canva site. Display = the 'honeyroot' wordmark face (rounded/elegant); body = a clean humanist sans. Exact families TODO(owner) — read them off the Canva editor's text styles.

brand.positioning: A fully mobile espresso experience designed to elevate events through handcrafted drinks and genuine connection.

photography.location: TODO(owner): Drive/Canva link to originals (not committed)

contact.$note: Confirmed from the Canva site and applied to Wix Business Info (site properties) on 2026-06-25.

templates: TODO(owner): Canva templates for posts, menu cards, flyers
fallback_grid: TODO(owner): static images used if the IG feed widget fails (runbook 07)
